common.brandTagline: Penciptaan dan perkongsian permainan pelayar berkuasa AI
common.loadingTimeout: Masa muat tamat: respons perkhidmatan terlalu perlahan. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.

nav.sidebarHint: Hasil pertama di atas, ruang kerja dan penemuan di bawah.

footer.description: {appName} - aliran kerja permainan pelayar berasaskan AI dan spesifikasi; sesuai untuk pengesahan idea, demo pengajaran, dan iterasi pantas.

account.loginDesc: Selepas log masuk, anda boleh menyelaraskan ruang kerja merentas peranti. Pautan perkongsian dengan kod jemputan membantu penjejakan rujukan. Anda juga boleh mencipta secara anonim menggunakan kuki pelayar.
account.oauthHint: WeChat / QQ / Feishu / LINE / Douyin memerlukan kelayakan aplikasi dalam .env sebelum diaktifkan. Gunakan Log Masuk Pembangunan untuk pembangunan tempatan.

home.wowMoment: Capai saat wow dalam tiga langkah
home.dualProductDesc: Lapisan 1: pintu masuk wow (Laman Utama → Cipta → Hasil). Lapisan 2: ruang kerja, penemuan, remix dan penyuntingan lanjutan.
home.strategyDesc: Pengguna baru terlebih dahulu merasai bahawa ia benar-benar boleh dijana. Pengguna lanjutan terus menggilap, menerbitkan dan mengurus dalam produk yang sama.
home.ctaDesc: Daripada satu ayat kepada sesuatu yang boleh dimainkan, dibaca dan ditonton - karya anda bermula sekarang.

pillars.wowBody: Pintu masuk penciptaan bersatu akan mencadangkan permainan, novel atau komik berdasarkan idea anda supaya anda cepat rasa: inilah yang saya mahukan.
pillars.depthBody: Jika anda suka, simpan dan kongsi. Jika ingin menggilapnya, sambung di ruang kerja dengan salinan, penulisan semula dan pelarasan.
pillars.communityBody: Lihat karya komuniti dan remix idea popular supaya penggunaan menjadi titik mula ciptaan seterusnya.

productIa.headline: Tukar satu ayat menjadi sesuatu yang boleh dimainkan, dibaca dan ditonton
productIa.subhead: Lihat hasil yang nyata dahulu, kemudian tentukan sama ada mahu terus menggilapnya. Permainan, novel dan komik semuanya boleh bermula daripada idea yang sama.

steps.step1Body: Tidak perlu pilih format dahulu. Hanya terangkan apa yang anda mahu lihat.
steps.step2Body: Sistem mencadangkan medium terbaik dan memberikan hasil yang boleh dilihat secepat mungkin.
steps.step3Body: Jika anda suka, simpan dan kongsi. Jika tidak, tukar arah dan teruskan.

modes.gameTagline: Lihat versi boleh main paling cepat, sesuai untuk demo dan perkongsian
modes.novelTagline: Sesuai untuk cerita, bab, kandungan kanak-kanak dan siri panjang
modes.comicTagline: Diadaptasi daripada teks novel dengan dialog/narasi dan ilustrasi panel
modes.comicEta: Sekitar 5-40 minit bergantung pada bilangan panel

starterPrompts: Pertahanan menara padang rumput lukisan tangan, menara anak panah kayu menjaga rumah lobak, haiwan kecil menyerang melalui jalan tanah
Cerita pendek kanak-kanak yang hangat tentang arnab putih kecil yang berkongsi lobak di hutan
Pengembara masa tiba di hujung Dinasti Ming dan mesti mengubah arah sejarah dalam tujuh hari
productIa.discoverIntakeTitle: Belum ada idea? Mulakan dengan remix karya orang lain
productIa.discoverIntakeBody: Lihat karya komuniti, salin tetapan ke ruang kerja anda dengan satu klik, dan ubah menjadi versi anda sendiri.

start.title: Mulakan dengan idea anda
start.desc: Tidak perlu pilih format dahulu. Kami akan mencadangkan sama ada ia patut menjadi permainan, novel atau komik, lalu membawa anda ke halaman penciptaan yang sesuai.
start.placeholder: Contohnya: pertahanan menara padang rumput lukisan tangan dengan menara anak panah menjaga rumah lobak ketika haiwan kecil menyerang melalui jalan tanah...

billing.title: Pelan & Kuota
billing.desc: Menjana karya menggunakan kuota untuk pengguna yang log masuk. Jemput rakan dan kedua-dua pihak menerima kredit bonus.
billing.devPaySuccess: Bayaran berjaya (simulasi dev), kuota telah ditambah
billing.orderCreated: Pesanan dicipta: {orderId}, sila lengkapkan pembayaran WeChat atau Alipay

studio.title: Ruang Kerja Pencipta
studio.desc: Lebih daripada arkib karya - ia menunjukkan apa yang anda cipta baru-baru ini, apa yang masih perlu diperbaiki, dan langkah seterusnya.
studio.searchPlaceholder: Tapis ikut tajuk, deskripsi, atau serpihan pautan pendek…
studio.empty: Belum ada karya. Mulakan dengan satu idea.
studio.noMatch: Tiada karya yang sepadan. Cuba kata kunci lain.
studio.coversReady: Semua kulit dan ilustrasi panel sudah sedia. Fokus pada penerbitan dan perkongsian.
studio.launcherTail: , atau remix kandungan popular dari halaman penemuan.

quota.title: Kuota penjanaan tidak mencukupi
quota.defaultError: Jemput rakan atau naik taraf pelan anda untuk terus mencipta.
quota.neededAvailable: Tindakan ini memerlukan {needed} kredit, baki semasa {available}

errors.globalDesc: Jika anda baru menjalankan ujian panjang atau mengubah konfigurasi dalam mod pembangunan, mulakan semula npm run dev dan cuba lagi.
errors.notFoundDesc: Pautan mungkin telah tamat tempoh, atau karya telah dipadam.

lists.gamesDesc: Teroka permainan komuniti yang dijana AI
lists.novelsDesc: Baca novel komuniti yang dijana AI
lists.comicsDesc: Lihat komik komuniti yang dijana AI
lists.novelDiscoverDesc: Baca novel komuniti, atau remix menjadi versi anda
lists.comicDiscoverDesc: Layari komik storyboard dan remix untuk mula mencipta
lists.deleteConfirmNovel: Padam "{title}"? Komik berkaitan turut dipadam dan tidak boleh dipulihkan.
lists.deleteConfirmComic: Padam komik "{title}"? Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibuat asal.
lists.deleteConfirmGame: Padam permainan "{title}"? Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibuat asal.
lists.deleteFailedSession: Gagal memadam. Sila gunakan sesi pelayar yang sama semasa penciptaan.

resultBanner.satisfied: Suka hasil ini? Simpan, kongsi atau terus perhalusi.

workStatus.savedPendingReview: Karya anda telah disimpan. Ia akan muncul dalam halaman penemuan selepas semakan.
workStatus.savedHidden: Karya anda telah disimpan sebagai peribadi dan hanya anda boleh melihatnya.
workStatus.savedPublished: Karya anda telah diterbitkan dan kini boleh ditemui oleh orang lain.

metadata.siteDescription: Operone: jana permainan yang boleh dimainkan, novel yang boleh dibaca, dan komik visual dengan AI, kemudian simpan, perkemas dan kongsi.
metadata.siteOgDescription: Platform berkuasa AI untuk mencipta permainan, novel dan komik.

dark.name: Indigo Tengah Malam
dark.tag: Cahaya bintang indigo · tengah malam dalam

share.defaultDesc: Lihat kandungan yang saya cipta dengan AI
share.linkCopied: Pautan disalin. Tampal ke WeChat, QQ, Feishu, dll.
share.wechatNativeHint: Ketik ··· di penjuru kanan atas untuk kongsi
share.wechatHint: Kongsi native dalam WeChat; salin pautan di tempat lain
share.qqHint: Salin pautan dan tampal di QQ
share.feishuHint: Salin pautan dan tampal di Feishu

novelResume.hint: Novel panjang boleh disambung dari halaman cipta tanpa bermula semula.

novelCreate.structureMarks: Struktur: {interpret} → {body} → {closing}. Untuk tukar tier, sunting brief dan kembali ke langkah 1.

novelRead.loginToAdapt: Log masuk untuk terus adaptasi; karya tempatan akan digabung selepas log masuk.

novelBrief.addonPlaceholder: cth. orang ketiga, romantik lebih berat, akhir terbuka…
novelBrief.childrenAddonPlaceholder: cth. nada lebih lembut, tambah soalan untuk ibu bapa…
novelBrief.narrativeModeRetelling: Classic retelling (lead tells the source tale)
novelBrief.narrativeModeListenerExtension: After-listening extension (child + friends learn the moral)

novelContinue.continueInterrupted: Strim sambung terganggu. Kekalkan halaman terbuka dan cuba lagi.

comicPanel.consistencyBody: Daripada badan novel dan brief kreatif, sistem mengunci reka bentuk watak → menjana rujukan seni selari → panel storyboard termasuk dialog/naratif (tiada teks boleh baca dalam seni) → seni panel berpaut pada rujukan dan gaya panel pertama. Karya panjang menjana teks storyboard dahulu, kemudian seni panel selari di halaman komik.
comicPanel.resumeCheckpoint: Akan sambung draf storyboard yang belum selesai (checkpoint disimpan)

transmigration.label: Transmigration
transmigration.desc: Time travel, identity swaps, rewriting fate

fantasy.label: Fantasy
fantasy.desc: Otherworld realms, progression systems, bloodlines and destiny

wuxia.label: Wuxia
wuxia.desc: Jianghu sects, honor and vendetta, martial arts manuals

historical.label: Historical
historical.desc: Dynastic politics, alternate history, legendary generals

urban.label: Urban
urban.desc: Modern city life, business wars, comeback arcs

romance.label: Romance
romance.desc: Sweetness and angst, relationships, emotional tension

scifi.label: Sci-Fi
scifi.desc: Future tech, space opera, apocalypse, AI and mecha

mystery.label: Mystery
mystery.desc: Detective work, locked rooms, layered twists

horror.label: Supernatural
horror.desc: Eerie folklore, survival horror, forbidden unknowns

infant_0_3.label: 0–3 years
infant_0_3.features: Short rhythmic lines, simple visuals, bedtime listening

kindergarten_3_6.label: 3–6 years
kindergarten_3_6.features: Playful tone, simple characters, gentle lessons

comicOptions.childrenStyleLocked: Untuk cerita pendek kanak-kanak, komik menggunakan susun atur buku bergambar Q-version lima panel yang dikunci.
comicOptions.childrenHint: Storyboard lalai menggunakan badan cerita kanak-kanak; interpretasi kreatif hanya untuk bacaan.

progressNovel.checkpointCreated: Draft created; each batch auto-saves for resume
progressNovel.batchSaved: Batch {index} saved — you can resume later
progressNovel.coverPending: Body complete — cover will generate on the reading page
progressNovel.generateFailed: Generation failed: models returned too little. Try a shorter length or retry later.
progressNovel.rateLimited: Too many generation requests. Please try again later.
progressNovel.startLong: Long pipeline: bible → chapter plan → segmented writing{polish} ({eta})…
progressNovel.startShort: Generation started — body streams in segments ({eta})…
progressNovel.chapterPlanReadyLong: Chapter plan ready — {count} chapters, starting segmented writing…
progressNovel.continueNoDelta: Continue writing did not add body text
progressNovel.continueFailed: Continue failed: models returned no valid delta, retry later
progressNovel.bibleRecoverStart: Pipeline archive missing — rebuilding character bible…
progressNovel.chapterPlanContinueStart: Planning remaining chapters from existing body…
progressNovel.chapterPlanNewStart: Original plan complete — planning new chapters…
progressNovel.chapterPlanNewReady: Added {count} new chapters to the plan
progressNovel.continueLimited: Writing {count} chapters this session (per your limit)
progressNovel.continueNoChapters: No chapters to continue and cannot extend plan

apiErrors.needTitleGenre: Sila berikan tajuk dan pilih genre
apiErrors.resumeNotFound: Tidak boleh sambung: draf tidak dijumpai atau akses ditolak
apiErrors.resumeCheckpointMissing: Tidak boleh sambung: data checkpoint hilang, sila jana semula
apiErrors.continueRateLimited: Terlalu banyak permintaan sambungan. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.
apiErrors.quotaInsufficient: Kuota penjanaan tidak mencukupi. Jemput rakan atau naik taraf pelan.
apiErrors.rateLimitedRetry: Terlalu banyak permintaan. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.
apiErrors.generateRateLimited: Terlalu banyak permintaan penjanaan. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.
apiErrors.variantsRateLimited: Terlalu banyak permintaan varian. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.
apiErrors.refineRateLimited: Terlalu banyak permintaan penghalusan. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.
apiErrors.invalidItems: Item tidak sah dalam array items
apiErrors.noIngestInput: Tiada fail atau pautan yang boleh diurai
apiErrors.generateFailed: Penjanaan gagal. Sila cuba lagi kemudian.
apiErrors.shareCodeFailed: Gagal menetapkan pautan kongsi. Sila cuba lagi.
apiErrors.novelGenerateFailed: Penjanaan novel gagal — model tidak mengembalikan kandungan mencukupi
apiErrors.coverGenFailed: Penjanaan kulit gagal. Semak konfigurasi OPENAI_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY.
apiErrors.noBrief: Karya tiada Creative Brief. Jana atau simpan dahulu.
apiErrors.coverComfyFailed: Penjanaan kulit gagal (Comfy tidak dikonfigurasi atau tamat masa)
apiErrors.expandChildrenInvalid: Pengembangan brief kanak-kanak mengembalikan hasil tidak sah
apiErrors.ttsNotConfigured: Volcengine TTS tidak dikonfigurasi. Tetapkan VOLC_TTS_APP_ID dan VOLC_TTS_ACCESS_TOKEN dalam .env
apiErrors.adminUserIdDelta: userId dan delta bukan sifar diperlukan
apiErrors.adminSuperAdminOnly: Hanya super admin boleh memberikan super_admin
apiErrors.promptTooShort: Penerangan terlalu pendek — masukkan sekurang-kurangnya beberapa aksara
apiErrors.oauthNotOpen: Log masuk {provider} belum dibuka — konfigurasi OAuth atau hubungi ops
apiErrors.godotTemplateUnsupported: Templat {templateId} belum menyokong eksport Godot Web
apiErrors.godotDataTooLarge: Data permainan terlalu besar atau rosak — buang sebahagian imej rujukan dan cuba lagi
apiErrors.patchSpecInvalid: Spes semasa tidak sah dan tidak boleh ditampal
apiErrors.patchFailed: Patch gagal — sila cuba lagi kemudian
apiErrors.refineBodyInvalid: Badan tidak sah: perlukan instruction (string) dan mode (patch | regenerate)
apiErrors.godotUnsupportedTemplate: Templat {templateId} tiada dalam senarai sokongan Godot
apiErrors.godotNotInstalled: Godot tidak dijumpai — jalankan npm run godot:install
apiErrors.godotWorkspaceInvalid: Laluan ruang kerja projek Godot tidak sah
apiErrors.godotBuildQueueConflict: Konflik barisan bina Godot — tunggu beberapa saat dan cuba lagi
apiErrors.godotWorkspaceConflict: Konflik ruang kerja Godot — tunggu beberapa saat dan cuba lagi
apiErrors.godotWindowsNeedsWindows: Binaan Windows memerlukan hos Windows — muat turun zip projek Godot dan eksport tempatan
apiErrors.godotAndroidNeedsSdk: Eksport Android memerlukan Android SDK — konfigurasi dalam editor Godot selepas muat turun zip projek
apiErrors.specSaveInvalid: Spes tidak sah — tidak boleh simpan
apiErrors.comicNovelForbidden: Tiada kebenaran menjana komik untuk novel ini
apiErrors.needNovelOrContent: Sediakan novelId atau tampal kandungan novel
apiErrors.commerceDevPayHint: Mod dev: POST /api/payment/wechat/notify dengan orderId untuk simulasi bayaran
apiErrors.coverTooLarge: Kulit terlalu besar — mampatkan dan cuba lagi
apiErrors.ttsTextTooLong: Segmen teks terlalu panjang — pendekkan dan cuba lagi
apiErrors.urlBlocked: Alamat ini tidak boleh diambil atas sebab keselamatan
apiErrors.ttsAuthFailed: Pengesahan suara Volcengine gagal: dayakan TTS Doubao di konsol, sahkan APP ID dan Access Key, dan benarkan suara.

eta.long: Long-form segmented writing ~1–3 hours — keep this page open

novelLength.streamInterruptLong: Generation stream interrupted (often gateway timeout). Long-form batches are auto-saved — resume from this page or the create page. {eta}
novelLength.streamInterruptShort: Generation stream interrupted (often gateway timeout). {eta} Keep this page open and retry.

novelListen.unsupported: Listen unavailable: configure Volcengine TTS (.env) or use a browser that supports speech.

gamePlayer.audioHint: Click the view or press any key to start background music
gamePlayer.landscapeHint: Tip: landscape or fullscreen gives a wider view.

gameRuntime.hint: Try <godot>Godot (online)</godot> first for the full browser build; Phaser is for instant preview. Export from the Godot tab when satisfied.
gameRuntime.godotTitle: Play the full Godot runtime in the browser
gameRuntime.cached: Online build cached · same spec won't rebuild
gameRuntime.readyHint: You can play in-page when ready
gameRuntime.godotReady: Godot online build is ready in the background — switch to Godot (online) for the full version.
gameRuntime.preferenceTitle: Default play engine; switch anytime in the preview area

game.addonPlaceholder: e.g. more bullet-hell, bigger boss, colder palette…

novel.addonPlaceholder: e.g. third person, heavier romance, open ending…

comic.addonPlaceholder: e.g. cinematic panels, less dialogue, big twist per page…

specTune.summary: ⚡ Live tune panel — coins, enemies, colors, rates
specTune.desc: Changes reload the left play preview immediately. Tune coins, enemy strength, colors, speed; save uses current debug values.
specTune.musicHint: Inferred from theme colors; environment and buzz reload with the play shell.
specTune.subtitle: Subtitle / mood (labels.subtitle)

samples.title: Galeri sampel
samples.desc: Sampel permainan popular — main terus. Kegemar selepas main, atau Klon ke studio anda untuk ubah suai.

featured.title: Pilihan pemain
featured.description: Kegemaran komuniti — ketik untuk main terus

trending.title: Sedang trending
trending.description: Merge, strategi, teka-teki dan arked yang sedang naik

fantasy-mmo-classic.title: Fantasi Chibi · Pengembaraan Klasik
fantasy-mmo-classic.subtitle: Suasana klasik · kemahiran & peristiwa
fantasy-mmo-classic.prompt: Bina mini permainan pengembaraan fantasi chibi: wira pengembara, musuh raksasa, mata wang Zeny; kemahiran (Shift), item dan sistem peristiwa (hujan syiling / serangan elit / perubahan matlamat). HUD jelas, rasa siap produk. (Jangan salin plot atau watak IP sedia ada.)
fantasy-mmo-classic.coverAlt: Fantasi chibi klasik: pratonton peristiwa dan kemahiran
fantasy-mmo-classic.creator: Makmal Operone

events-showcase.title: Demo Peristiwa: Tiga Pusingan
events-showcase.subtitle: Sistem peristiwa · hujan syiling / elit / matlamat
events-showcase.prompt: Bina mini permainan arked berasaskan peristiwa: hujan syiling, serangan elit dan perubahan matlamat jelas dalam tiga fasa; HUD mesra, kemahiran dan item mudah dibaca. Gaya flat lembut atau kertas cat air — bukan neon cyber sebagai lalai.
events-showcase.coverAlt: Demo peristiwa: hujan syiling, elit, perubahan matlamat
events-showcase.creator: Makmal Operone

td-carrot.title: Pertahanan Lobak
td-carrot.subtitle: TD comel · pelbagai menara · gelombang
td-carrot.prompt: Bina TD comel gaya pertahan lobak: menara kucing jaga lobak, musuh tikus usik; tekankan gelombang, naik taraf dan ekonomi syiling.
td-carrot.coverAlt: Pertahanan Lobak: TD comel, gelombang dan naik taraf
td-carrot.creator: Makmal Operone

td-kingdom.title: Garis Sempadan Kerajaan
td-kingdom.subtitle: TD epik · musuh berperisai · kawalan perlahan
td-kingdom.prompt: Bina TD epik gaya Kingdom Rush: menara anak panah, bom dan frost; musuh berperisai dan pembunuh upahan; gelombang lebih keras.
td-kingdom.coverAlt: Garis Sempadan Kerajaan: TD epik dan pertahan bandar
td-kingdom.creator: Makmal Operone

td-cyber.title: (Demo gaya) Garisan Data
td-cyber.subtitle: Pilihan · TD neon/siber · kontras tinggi
td-cyber.prompt: TD neon cyberpunk: menara meriam denyut dan protokol perlahan; musuh program invasi dan dron berperisai; kontras warna hangat/sejuk kuat.
td-cyber.coverAlt: Garisan Data: nyatakan suasana neon/siber dalam brief
td-cyber.creator: Makmal Operone

plat-ruins.title: Platformer Runtuhan
plat-ruins.subtitle: Platformer · berlapis · perangkap & kutipan
plat-ruins.prompt: Larian sisi: runtuhan batu dan lumut lukisan tangan, lompat berlapis, kutip api pine torch, elak paku dan jambatan retak; rentak padat, palet matte semula jadi.
plat-ruins.creator: Makmal Operone

studioErrors.novelsJsonFailed: Novel list response could not be parsed (may not be JSON)
studioErrors.comicsJsonFailed: Comic list response could not be parsed (may not be JSON)
studioErrors.confirmBatchDelete: Delete {count} selected work(s)? This cannot be undone.
studioErrors.batchDeleteFailed: Batch delete failed. Please try again.

comicRead.noStream: Server did not return stream progress — retry later
comicRead.renderRequestFailed: Panel art request failed — retry later
comicRead.confirmRegenAll:
Clear all {count} existing panel images and regenerate cover + panels for the urban theme.

This takes a while — keep this page open. Continue?
comicRead.confirmRegenPage:
Clear page {page} art and regenerate all panels on this page.

Continue?
comicRead.subtitle: Based on "{novel}" · {total} storyboard pages{scope}
comicRead.metaHint: Dialogue/time overlays on art; narration below without duplication. Missing art shows storyboard text first.
comicRead.connectingWait: Connecting to image service, please wait…
comicRead.renderingDefault: Generating comic panel art (not the list cover) — keep this page open.
comicRead.etaHint: · each panel ~2–8 min depending on gateway load — keep page open
comicRead.panelArtPending: Storyboard ready — {total} panels still need art. Minimal on-image text; narration below; art should be text-free.
comicRead.panelArtDone: All panel art done ({withImage}/{total}). Regenerate if needed; resume skips existing images.
comicRead.panelArtPartial: Partial art: {withImage}/{total} done. Resume is serial, anchored to first panel + cover (needs GEMINI_API_KEY), skipping existing.
comicRead.loginToRender: Please <login>sign in</login> to continue panel art; local works merge after login.

comicCreatePage.title: Create Comic
comicCreatePage.desc: Paste a full novel or just a one-line idea. The system expands the adaptation brief first, then generates the storyboard; dialogue, narration, and images are completed step by step.
comicCreatePage.titlePlaceholder: Leave empty to extract from the first line automatically
comicCreatePage.ideaLabel: One-line idea (optional; when pasting a long text, you can specify the adaptation direction here)
comicCreatePage.ideaPlaceholder: Example: a retired hacker in a cyberpunk city investigates an AI awakening case…
comicCreatePage.contentPlaceholder:
Paste your novel, story, or any narrative text here…
Long text is supported. AI will automatically parse the plot, characters, and key scenes.
comicCreatePage.generatingDetail: Storyboard comes first. Multi-page works continue image generation on the detail page.
comicCreatePage.connectService: Connecting to the comic generation service…
comicCreatePage.briefReady: AI has expanded the comic adaptation brief. Starting storyboard generation…

japanese_clean.label: Shonen Jepun (bersih)
japanese_clean.hint: Garisan bersih, wajah ekspresif — kampus, pengembaraan, kehidupan harian

chibi_cute.label: Chibi comel
chibi_cute.hint: Kepala besar, badan kecil — sesuai untuk kanak-kanak atau komedi

children_picture_book.label: Buku bergambar kanak-kanak
children_picture_book.hint: Gaya buku bergambar moden berwarna-warni dengan garisan bulat tebal

korean_shoujo.label: Shoujo Korea romantis
korean_shoujo.hint: Ciri halus dan gradien lembut — romantis dan cerita manis

chinese_wuxia.label: Wuxia donghua China
chinese_wuxia.hint: Jianghu xianxia dengan jubah berkibar — terbaik untuk cerita kostum sejarah

chinese_campus.label: Komik kampus China
chinese_campus.hint: Gaya animasi domestik — pakaian seragam sekolah dan kehidupan kampus

createFlow.title: Cipta
createFlow.desc: Tukar idea satu ayat kepada aliran penciptaan bersama 4 langkah: jelaskan niat, pilih arah, jana spesifikasi, kemudian main dan simpan versinya. Kemajuan penstriman dan tiga varian selari turut disokong.
createFlow.shortcut: Pintasan: Ctrl / Cmd + Enter -> jana satu varian secara penstriman
createFlow.replayLoading: Sedang memuatkan deskripsi penuh terakhir yang disimpan dari pustaka anda…
createFlow.replayError: Tidak dapat memuatkan deskripsi karya daripada pautan ini. Ia mungkin telah dipadam atau datang daripada persekitaran lain. Buka dari Ruang Kerja dan guna Jana Semula.
createFlow.replayLoaded: Deskripsi dimuatkan daripada {title} (termasuk petikan rujukan yang digabung sebelum ini). Anda biasanya boleh klik "Jana Versi Boleh Main" terus tanpa memilih fail lagi.
createFlow.promptPlaceholder: Babak + matlamat + halangan atau objek kutipan + kata kunci gaya visual pilihan…
createFlow.busyVariants: Sedang menjana berbilang varian secara selari…
createFlow.currentIntent: Buat masa ini idea anda difahami sebagai:
createFlow.processEmpty: Sebaik penstriman bermula, panel ini akan terus menambah ringkasan prompt, aset dan nota sistem.
createFlow.processNote: Nota: ringkasan pelan mengandungi peraturan dan salinan keselamatan, bukan penaakulan tersembunyi model. Kerja backend yang lama mungkin kekal pada "Penjanaan Mendalam" seketika.
createFlow.modeGenerated: Kini dalam mod main dan simpan.
createFlow.modeBound: Idea ini sudah terikat pada projek sedia ada dan boleh disimpan ganti.
createFlow.modeNew: Selepas penjanaan, anda boleh simpan sebagai projek baharu.
createFlow.chooseDirectionFirst: Sila pilih arah penciptaan bersama dahulu.
createFlow.spriteWait: Sedang menjana sprite permainan khusus (watak, musuh, latar dan sebagainya). Biasanya mengambil masa 2-3 minit, kemudian halaman main akan dibuka secara automatik…
createFlow.ingestBusy: Sedang menghuraikan aset… (fail yang dimuat naik diberi keutamaan berbanding imej papan klip)
createFlow.previewHint: Selepas melengkapkan idea dan aset rujukan, jana dan main di bawah. Cuba runtime Godot penuh dahulu; Phaser sesuai untuk pratonton segera.
createFlow.previewEmpty: Klik "Jana Versi Boleh Main" atau "3 varian" dan kawasan pratonton akan muncul di bawah idea serta aset rujukan.

examples.0: Build a cat tower beside a country path to block carrot-stealing mouse armies
examples.1: Underwater fish collect pearls while dodging octopus ink
examples.2: Watercolor hill tower defense: arrow towers guard carrot fields along a winding dirt path

sourceHints.mock: Fell back to local rule inference (see fallback reason under Generation Evidence)

brief.label: Deep expansion

prep.defaultMsg: Organizing your prompt and options into an executable plan…

running.label: Deep generation
running.defaultMsg: LLM drafting + local correction + spec validation (may take tens of seconds to minutes)…

recap.label: Final summary
recap.defaultMsg: Extracting template, title, and key values…

log.effectivePrompt: Effective prompt sent to the model (merged excerpt)
log.imageCaptions: Reference image notes (per image, from multimodal request; not full model reasoning)

log.variantsEmptyHint: Server returned an empty array — please retry later.

stream.briefWritten: Idea summary is in Process on the right; connecting to the cloud pipeline next…

errors.noAssets: Select at least one asset file, or enter a URL in the link field
errors.noMergeText: No mergeable text returned — check files or links
errors.invalidSpec: Current spec is invalid and cannot be saved
errors.spriteTimeout: Sprite generation timed out; project saved. Refresh the play page later.

ingest.qualityReduced: JPEG quality was reduced further automatically
ingest.storageFailed: Reference images still could not be saved to session storage; tower-defense play will skip this batch.

ref.title: Reference assets
ref.summary: PNG/WebP/GIF keep alpha; sticker assets auto-fit sprite cells; set a purpose
ref.summaryTooltip: PNG/WebP/GIF saved to session with <transparent>alpha preserved</transparent> (no white fill). In the clipboard queue, set a <purpose>purpose</purpose> per image: mark as enemy/hero/tower <sticker>sticker types</sticker> to auto <spriteGrid>center-fit square sprite cells</spriteGrid> for tower-defense marches; do not mark large map backgrounds as enemies/towers. <noMatting>Server does not AI-mat</noMatting> complex photos — supply transparent assets yourself. With "Interpret reference images" checked, the model adds practical suggestions per image.
ref.noUploadHint: You can generate without uploads — the platform will draw characters automatically
ref.searchEnhanceHint: Off by default; when on, searches similar games and injects findings into the description
ref.generateHint: Click Generate to auto-parse queued assets; URLs in the link field are fetched and merged too
ref.generateTooltipA: When you click Generate, queued files/clipboard images or a public URL in the link field (e.g. mc.163.com) are parsed and appended to the description first.
ref.generateTooltipB: Upload PDF / DOCX / TXT / MD / images, <paste>Ctrl+V / ⌘V paste screenshots</paste>, or paste a public page link. Session writes <compress>auto-resize/compress</compress> first; if storage limits are hit, quality drops or trailing images are removed automatically. Tower-defense play uses <bg>background-class</bg> assets as maps and <enemy>enemy-class</enemy> as march sprites by purpose.
ref.purposePlaceholder: e.g. background map / enemy / hero / tower skin…
ref.urlPlaceholder: https:// online doc or article link

godotExport.offlineDesc: Online play needs no download. Use the buttons below only to install on PC, edit in Godot, or build for mobile.

novelCreatePage.pageDesc: Tetapkan tajuk dan genre -> biar AI mengembangkan brief -> tulis secara penstriman -> jana kulit dan terbitkan.
novelCreatePage.waitForBrief: Sila tunggu AI menyiapkan perluasan brief, atau klik jana semula.
novelCreatePage.coverTimeout: Penjanaan kulit tamat masa (sekitar 3 minit). Klik "Buat Semula Kulit" untuk cuba lagi.
novelCreatePage.modelShort: Model {model} menghasilkan kandungan terlalu pendek, cuba sandaran…
novelCreatePage.browserDraft: Draf pelayar yang belum selesai dikesan (sebelum sambungan terputus)
novelCreatePage.titlePlaceholder: Contoh: Pengawal Rahsia Pertama Dinasti Ming
novelCreatePage.selectedGenreHint: Selepas memilih genre, AI akan mengembangkan brief mengikut konvensyen genre tersebut.
novelCreatePage.ageDesc: Untuk ibu bapa: lima tahap pembaca (0-3 / 3-6 / 6-8 / 9 / 10), 90-900 aksara, dengan tafsiran semakin mendalam mengikut umur.
novelCreatePage.lengthDesc: Pendek / sederhana / panjang. Masih boleh diubah sebelum masuk ke langkah penulisan.
novelCreatePage.addonPlaceholder: Contohnya: protagonis perlu licik, rentak perlahan pada awalnya, pengakhiran bahagia…
novelCreatePage.briefBusyChildren: AI sedang menyusun brief cerita kanak-kanak (tafsiran + plot tiga ayat)…
novelCreatePage.briefBusyNovel: AI sedang mengembangkan dunia, watak dan rentak bab…
novelCreatePage.briefConfirmedChildren: Brief disahkan. Umur pembaca sudah ditetapkan pada langkah 1, jadi anda boleh terus jana teks.
novelCreatePage.briefConfirmedNovel: Brief disahkan. Sila pilih panjang dan mula menulis.
novelCreatePage.lengthSync: Panjang (selaras dengan langkah 1, boleh diubah di sini)
novelCreatePage.coverHint: Pratonton kulit menegak di bawah. Jika tidak puas hati, buat semula kulit terus di sini. Anda boleh menyalin pautan kongsi selepas siap.
novelCreatePage.redoCoverHint: Tidak puas hati dengan gaya? Buat semula kulit dalam beberapa saat.

superAdmin.devAutoBody: You can delete any {scope} from the gallery (Manage delete on cards). Enabled by DEV_SUPER_ADMIN=1 for local dev only — disable in .env before production.
superAdmin.helpText: No preset secret. Set SUPER_ADMIN_SECRET in project .env (see .env.example), restart npm run dev, then enter the same string here to delete others' {scope}. Or set DEV_SUPER_ADMIN=1 locally to skip the key.

playGame.samplePlayHint: Permainan galeri sampel: kegemar selepas main, atau klon ke studio anda untuk ubah suai.
playGame.guestPlayHint: Guest play · Remix saves to your session library
playGame.coCreateDesc: AI patch and quick tune above persist into this project — not just a one-off play session.
playGame.coCreateOwnerHint: You own this work: refinements are logged (partial patch or full regenerate). Guests use anonymous patch.
playGame.patchPlaceholder: Describe a change in one line, e.g. raise starting gold to 200, slow zombies, green grass background…

devBanner.title: Dev tip:
devBanner.body: Current origin {current} differs from your phone's LAN URL — theme, reference sessions, and ownership won't sync. Use {canonical} on both devices.

godotWeb.audioClickHint: Click the view to enable music and sound

clientErrors.useGameStudio: Gunakan studio permainan untuk pengembangan brief permainan

playStyle.towerDefense: Your description reads **tower defense**: path marching + tower placement/upgrades + wave pacing.
playStyle.shooter: Your description reads **shooter**: top-down fire loops, wave pressure, and skill windows.
playStyle.platformer: Your description reads **platformer**: jumping, layered platforms, and collection goals.
playStyle.collector: Your description reads **collector**: pick up objects in the scene while avoiding threats.
playStyle.survivor: Your description reads **survival / forgiving dodge**: heavier HP and pacing pressure.
playStyle.avoider: Your description reads **avoider**: dodge threats with limited lives or forgiveness.
playStyle.fallback: No strong keyword match — the model/auto pipeline will infer the best template (avoider / collector / survivor / platformer / towerDefense / shooter).

templateHint.towerDefense: Template hint **tower defense** — generation will prioritize TD structure and numbers.
templateHint.shooter: Template hint **shooter** — will prioritize enemy waves, fire loops, and pressure.
templateHint.platformer: Template hint **platformer** — will emphasize jump feel and level goals.
templateHint.auto: Template hint **auto** — the model picks avoider/collector/survivor/platformer/towerDefense/shooter from your line.

prep.header: ── How the system will handle your prompt (summary, not hidden chain-of-thought):
prep.searchOn: **Web search enabled** — fetch similar play/style cues first, then merge summaries into the brief.
prep.searchOff: **Web search off** this round — text plus optional reference excerpts only.
prep.enhanceOn: Running a **second enhancement pass** to thicken systems and readable numbers.
prep.enhanceOff: Enhancement pass off — single spec pass, then local repair/validation.

fantasy.cute: Cute characters / relaxed mood / cozy tone
fantasy.default: A unified world built from your current description

gameplayCore.towerDefense: Path marching, tower upgrades, elite waves, and hold-the-point pressure together.
gameplayCore.shooter: Move-dodge, auto fire, enemy formations, and short-cooldown skills in a loop.
gameplayCore.platformer: Jump feel, terrain, collect goals, and mechanic shifts drive progress.
gameplayCore.collector: Move-collect and avoid threats in parallel for steady reward feedback.
gameplayCore.survivor: Forgiveness and pressure together — survival decisions get harder over time.
gameplayCore.avoider: Short dodge rounds and clear goals — avoid random obstacle soup.

intent.strengthEnough: One sentence is enough for a first GameSpec — refine via direction picks.
intent.riskGoal: The win condition is still vague — add what the player must ultimately do.
intent.riskThreat: Threats are vague — you may get theme without pressure.
intent.riskProgression: Progression cues are thin — use direction picks to add layers.

directionBullets.commonLead: Keep title, enemies, goals, and HUD naming unified under 「{fantasy}」.
directionBullets.td0: Stress three tower roles, elite waves, and hold events.
directionBullets.shooter0: Stress formations, fire windows, and burst skills.
directionBullets.platformer0: Level beats, terrain mechanics, timed micro-goals.
directionBullets.platformer1: Forward exploration, not random single-screen jumps.
directionBullets.default0: Goals, threats, and phase shifts — not theme-only wrapping.
directionBullets.depthExtra: Thicker mid-layer decisions and phase shifts.
directionBullets.spectacleExtra1: Stronger titles, subtitles, faction naming, and climax beats.
directionBullets.spectacleExtra2: Still playable — bolder thematic packaging allowed.

balanced.title: Ship-ready
balanced.summary: Clear rules, obvious goals, easy first play.
balanced.addonLine2: Goals, fail states, and progression visible at a glance.
balanced.addonLine3: Conservative numbers for a stable v1.

depth.title: Deeper systems
depth.summary: More events, skills, phases, and mid-layer decisions.
depth.addonLine2: Boost at least two of: skills, events, elites/bosses, goal shifts.
depth.addonLine3: Not just reskin — visibly richer gameplay.

spectacle.title: Spectacle first
spectacle.summary: Strong theme, naming, and climax while staying playable.
spectacle.addonLine2: Sharper theme naming, HUD copy, and set-piece beats.
spectacle.addonLine3: Memorable world on top of a complete loop.

assets.none: No queued uploads/clipboard refs this time — text only.

stream.recapTd: **TD overview**: base HP **{baseHealth}** · start coins **{startingCoins}** · waves **{winScore}** (tweak in quick debug).
stream.recapGeneric: **Core numbers**: player speed {playerSpeed} · hazard speed {hazardSpeed} · win score {winScore}.
stream.recapSearchUsed: **Web search**: summary merged; sources may appear after completion.
stream.recapSearchFallback: **Web search**: no usable summary this round — text-only pipeline.{warning}

comicPanelProgress.geminiRequired: Comic panel art needs GEMINI_API_KEY for style consistency (first panel + cover as references; only Gemini multimodal supports this).
comicPanelProgress.geminiWeakOpenAI: GEMINI_API_KEY is not set; OpenAI will render panels one by one (weaker style consistency — configure Gemini if possible).
comicPanelProgress.startAnchoredSheets: {detail} · Character refs anchored{extraRef}; first panel sets tone, then parallel panels
comicPanelProgress.startParallel: {detail} · First panel anchors style, then up to {concurrency} parallel jobs
comicPanelProgress.batchGenerating: Generating {count} panel images in one batch (elapsed {elapsed})…
comicPanelProgress.panelGenerating: Panel {index}/{total}: elapsed {elapsed}, image generation in progress…
comicPanelProgress.comfyNoImages: ComfyUI returned no images; falling back to cloud image generation
comicPanelProgress.comfyPartial: ComfyUI succeeded on {ok}/{total} panels; cloud generation will fill the rest
comicPanelProgress.regenCover: Menjana semula muka depan komik gaya {genre}…
comicPanelProgress.scopeNoImages: No images in the selected scope; filling missing panels…
comicPanelProgress.connectedSerial: Connected to image service: {detail}; serial generation (auto-fills missing panels)…
comicPanelProgress.noneGeneratedWithHint: No panel images generated. {hint}. Check server logs [comic-panels] / [image-gen]

ingestWarnings.imageRolesInvalid: Invalid imageRoles JSON — per-image purpose labels were ignored
ingestWarnings.zipTooManyFiles: {name}: too many files in archive — only the first 30 were parsed
ingestWarnings.refCacheFailed: {name}: reference image could not be cached on server — Godot export may miss textures
ingestWarnings.noOpenAiKey: {name}: OPENAI_API_KEY is not set — cannot interpret reference image
ingestWarnings.visionOff: {name}: vision interpretation is off — filename recorded only
ingestWarnings.unsupportedFormat: {name}: unsupported format (use pdf / docx / txt / md / image / zip)
ingestWarnings.cloudUploadUrlMissing: REFERENCE_ASSET_STORAGE=cloud but REFERENCE_ASSET_CLOUD_UPLOAD_URL is not set — references stay session-only.
ingestWarnings.cloudUploadIncomplete: REFERENCE_ASSET_CLOUD_UPLOAD_URL is set but server upload is not implemented — still session-only.

ingestMarkers.imageNumberLegend: [Penomboran imej ruj] Di bawah, "Imej 1", "Imej 2", … ikut susunan muat naik untuk imej sahaja (selari dengan "Imej ruj #N"; PDF/teks biasa tidak dikira). Semasa menjana spesifikasi, gunakan tujuan setiap imej pada title/subtitle, warna theme, dan label (player/hazard/collectible). Untuk templat pertahan menara, sesi pelayar yang sama boleh memaparkan piksel rujukan sebagai sprite mengikut tujuan. PNG/WebP/GIF kekal alpha; peran sprite dipusatkan dalam petak segi; pelayan tidak memotong foto kompleks secara automatik.

novelCompleteness.mediumTooFewChapters: Bab terlalu sedikit untuk cerita sederhana — garis utama belum lengkap
novelCompleteness.unfinishedEnding: Penutup masih menggantung atau menunjuk bab seterusnya
novelCompleteness.tailTooShort: Penutup terlalu pendek — seperti terpotong separuh jalan
novelCompleteness.longTooFewChapters: Bab terlalu sedikit untuk novel panjang — belum sampai fasa penutup
novelCompleteness.noEndingSignal: Penutup tiada isyarat penyelesaian yang jelas
novelCompleteness.okComplete: Struktur lengkap dan cerita sampai penutup yang wajar

novelContinuation.notLongForm: Sambungan AI hanya untuk novel panjang

finalBarrage.title: Final barrage
finalBarrage.message: Dense threats incoming — survive to finish

msg.coinRain: Collectibles spawn faster — score multiplier up
msg.coinRainTd: Extra coins flood in — upgrade towers quickly
msg.coinRainPlat: Timed sprint — chain jumps for bonus rewards
msg.goalShift: Timed objective — follow the HUD hint for a bonus
msg.goalShiftTd: Don't let enemies leak before the timer ends
msg.goalShiftPlat: Timed sprint — collect targets for extra rewards
msg.miniBoss: Threat level rises — tougher foes for a while
msg.miniBossTd: Armored elites — bring DPS and slows
msg.coinRainFallback: Rewards spawn faster for a short window
msg.goalShiftFallback: Follow the timed objective for a bonus
msg.miniBossFallback: Danger spikes — stronger threats for a while
msg.coinRainShort: Quick bonus window — grab extra rewards
msg.goalShiftShort: Short timed goal — finish for a bonus

collector.coinRain: More pickups on the field — reposition for combos
collector.goalShift: Collect as much as you can before time runs out
collector.miniBoss: Elites mix in — clear threats before greed

survivor.coinRain: Hold your line — use the window to push score
survivor.goalShift: Fill the meter before the timer ends
survivor.miniBoss: Density spikes — save skills for this wave

avoider.coinRain: Gaps tighten — keep your lateral rhythm
avoider.goalShift: Stack risky dodges and positioning points
avoider.miniBoss: Elites disrupt lanes — focus on evasion

goldenPickup.title: Golden pickup
goldenPickup.message: High-value targets appear briefly — grab them first

gameEvents.breathingRoomMsg: Threat density drops briefly — recover and restock

playScene.bossMessage: Elite boss · defeat it for a huge score boost

platformer.finalSprint: Final sprint — elites blocking the path

hud.tdNextWave: Next wave in {sec}s — keep building and upgrading.
hud.tdLose: Base breached · tweak stats or tower placement and retry.
hud.waveStartFirst: Battle begins! Spend coins on towers and upgrades
hud.waveStartLast: Final wave! Hold the line to win 🏆
hud.waveStartMid: New wave incoming! Hold your ground
hud.tdControls: Tap tower slots to build/upgrade "{tower}" · Shift for skill · stop "{foe}" from reaching base

finishWin.collector: Collection complete! Resources secured — share or play again.
finishWin.survivor: You survived the final pressure — share or play again.
finishWin.avoider: You cleared the final barrage — share or play again.

finishLose.collector: Almost had those resources — try again or tweak your brief.
finishLose.survivor: Couldn't survive the last wave — try again or tweak your brief.
finishLose.avoider: Dodge run failed — try again or tweak your brief.

hud.controlsPlatformer: ← → / A D move · Space / W / ↑ jump · Shift skill · collect "{coll}"
hud.controlsShooter: ← → / A D move · auto-fire at "{hazard}" · Shift skill
hud.shooterFinishWin: Victory! Play again or share from the page buttons.
hud.shooterFinishLose: Keep trying · play again or tweak your brief.
hud.platformerFinishWin: Cleared! Big stage conquered · save or share your link.
hud.platformerFinishLose: Keep trying · play again or strengthen your brief.

collector.finale: Final collection surge — risk and reward spike together
collector.bonusField: Bonus field — high-value pickups, grab them first
collector.doubleSpawn: Field heats up — more pickups and threats
collector.default: Keep moving and widen your collection lead

survivor.finale: Final survival wave — hold through peak pressure
survivor.doubleSpawn: Pressure rises — more threats at once
survivor.default: Keep surviving — stabilize health and rhythm

avoider.finale: Final dodge segment — dense threats incoming
avoider.default: Stay in rhythm for the next dodge segment

platformer.precision: Precision segment — smaller margins, watch your landings
platformer.gaps: Gap segment — prepare for long jumps
platformer.spikes: Trap segment — hazards cluster on platforms

banner.goalFailedMsg: Keep going — the next phase hits harder
banner.goldenWindowEndMsg: Keep collecting and stay in rhythm
banner.eventEndPlay: Get ready for the next challenge
banner.platformerGoalMissMsg: No worries — the next section is even wilder
banner.tdHoldFailMsg: Next section hits harder — reinforce your defense
